questions: List every source in this notebook. For each source give: exact title, URL if present in metadata, content type (paper, video, web, chat), and a one-line topic label. Then state the total source count.
In 3 sentences: what is the central thesis of this notebook? Which concepts are actionable for building an agent harness (MCP, skills, hooks, memory) vs background-only theory?

Define every key term in this notebook (scaffold, harness, skill tree, HORMA, HIP-If, Socratic policy optimization, self-harness, agent-native knowledge orchestration, K1). Give a one-sentence definition and how they relate hierarchically.
List step-by-step operational workflows for memory, planning, tool loops, and self-correction. For each workflow give triggers, stop conditions, and required artifacts.
List boundaries and anti-patterns: what should an agent harness NOT do? Include risks of self-evolving harness without human gate, flat skill libraries, context pollution, and LLM-as-judge loops.
How should this notebook integrate with MCP tools, procedural skills (.md workflows), hooks, and wiki/knowledge graphs? List concrete integration seams and file-level artifacts.

What metrics, eval protocols, and pass/fail gates should an agent harness use? Include self-harness iteration benchmarks, memory token savings, planning success rates, and skill-tree routing accuracy.
Which recommendations are experimental vs production-ready for a single-user Cursor agent-rules brain repo?

Cross-check this notebook against SkillDAG, LifeHarness 4-layer, model-native skills (Geometry notebook), and the prior Harness SkillTree notebook (86aaaf0e). What is covered, partial, gap, or reject?
Prioritize P0 P1 P2 upgrades for agent-rules workspace (.cursor/rules, MCP, SKILL_*.md, orchestrator). For each: target artifact path, acceptance test, dependencies.
List risks: token budget, hallucination, ethics, AI bubble, autonomous rule rewrite. How should agent-rules mitigate each?
Propose MVP vs full rollout with test plan and eval seed cases for the brain repo.
List open questions that need human confirmation before implementation.
Final delta table: concept | status (covered/partial/gap/reject) | recommended action | risk.
pass2: Updated source list after web/paper expansion. What was added and why?
Top 12 claims now backed by paper or repo vs video-only. Tag each VERIFIED, INFERRED, or UNVERIFIED.
Cross-check duplicates vs prior Harness SkillTree (86aaaf0e), SkillDAG, Geometry, Humanize, and loop-of-loops notebooks.
Revised P0/P1/P2 for agent-rules with target artifact paths after expanded sources.
Final REJECT list with rationale (auto rule rewrite, unverified benchmarks, 500-skill import, etc.).
Delta table: concept | covered/partial/gap/reject | action | risk.
